description_long: This is a modern, wide armchair upholstered in a textured blue-gray fabric with a subtle chevron pattern. The seat is generously sized and features two loose cushions: one large square cushion in matching blue-gray and a smaller accent cushion in mustard yellow. The armrests are broad, straight, and fully upholstered, providing a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, also fully upholstered and fitted with a large cushion for added comfort. The chair stands on four short, black, tapered legs that elevate it slightly off the ground. The overall design is plush and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A wide, modern armchair with blue-gray chevron upholstery, two cushions (one yellow, one blue-gray), and black tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, both cushions, and the full width of the armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the back cushion, and the armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tall, straight backrest and the chevron upholstery pattern wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the yellow cushion more prominently and the armrest's straight, padded design.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, straight, fully upholstered and padded
attribute_backrest_style: tall, straight, fully upholstered with a large loose cushion
attribute_leg_type: short, tapered, black legs, likely metal or wood
